response.justification: Wei Chen is a highly skilled Staff Software Engineer with an impressive track record in full-stack development and open-source contributions. However, he falls short of the executive-level requirements for this Head of Development role, most notably lacking the mandatory C1 German proficiency required for client advisory. Furthermore, his resume highlights individual contributor and technical accomplishments rather than the formal team leadership, enterprise IT architecture, and security/compliance consulting experience expected for this position.
strengths: Extensive experience in modern software development and open-source technologies across multiple stacks.
Demonstrated initiative in mentoring, teaching, and community building through workshops and coding dojos.
Proven ability to design and architect complex platforms from the ground up, such as the GISCollective.
concerns: Does not meet the mandatory minimum C1 German language requirement (currently at Basic level).
Lacks explicit executive-level leadership and formal technical project management experience.
Missing demonstrated experience in IT security, risk management, and compliance advisory for enterprise clients.
